debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
V PO W : Set (Set X)
hWV : W ⊆ V
hW : ∀ A ∈ V, ∃ B ∈ W, B ⊆ A
p : Player
S : Strategy (@chainTree X V) p
x : ↥S.pre.subtree
xs : List ↑V
A : ↑V
ys : ↥(Strategy.pre (@restrict X V W hWV hW p S)).subtree
this : xs ++ [A] ∈ S.pre.subtree
h : xs ∈ @chainTree X V ∧ ∀ (hx : xs ≠ []), A ≤ xs.getLast hx
hx✝ : ¬↑ys = []
⊢ ↑A ⊆ ↑((↑ys).getLast ⋯)

failed_attempts: simpa using h.2 (by simpa) (by simpa)
exact h.2 (by simpa using hx✝)

simpa using (h.2 (by simpa)) (by
          simpa [List.last_eq_getLast] using congrArg (fun t : List V => t ≠ []) (by
            simpa using congrArg (fun t : List W => (t.map (Set.inclusion hWV) : List V)) rfl))

exact h.2 (by
          intro hys
          exact hx✝ (by simpa [hys])

exact h.2 (by
          intro hnil
          have : (xs.map (Set.inclusion hWV)) ≠ [] := by
            simpa [List.map_eq_nil] using hnil
          simpa [extend, extend_coe] using this)
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa [List.getLast?_eq_getLast hx✝] ) )

simpa using h.2 (by
          intro hnil
          have : (PreStrategy.subtree_incl (restrict hWV hW S).pre ys).val ≠ [] := by
            simpa [PreStrategy.subtree_incl] using hnil
          simpa [PreStrategy.subtree_incl] using this)
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa)).1 (by simpa [List.getLast_eq_getLast?_getD] using hx✝)

exact h.2 (by
          intro hnil
          simpa [hnil] using hx✝)
simpa using (h.2 hx✝)
simpa using h.2 (by simpa)
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa using hx✝))
simpa using h.2 (by simpa using hx✝)
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa using hx✝))
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa using hx✝))

have hy : (↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV) ∈ chainTree V := (PreStrategy.subtree_incl _ ys).prop
        have hyc : (↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV) ∈ chainTree V ∧ ∀ hx, (Set.inclusion hWV A) ≤ ((↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV)).getLast hx := by
          simpa [def_chainTree] using And.intro hy (by
            intro hx
            have := (def_chainTree (V := V) ((↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV))).1 hy
            exact this.last_le_getLast (a := Set.inclusion hWV A) hx)
        have hlast : (Set.inclusion hWV A) ≤ ((↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV)).getLast (by
          intro hnil; exact hx✝ (by simpa [hnil]))
          := (hyc.2 (by
            intro hnil; exact hx✝ (by simpa [hnil])))
        simpa using hlast
simpa using h.2 (by simpa)
simpa using h.2 hx✝

exact (h.2 (by
          intro hnil
          exact hx✝ (by simpa [hnil] : (ys.val : List W) = [])))

exact (h.2 (by
          intro hys
          exact hx✝ (by simpa [hys])))
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa using hx✝))
simpa using h.2 hx✝

exact h.2 (by
          intro hys
          have : (ys : List V) ≠ [] := by
            intro h'
            apply hys
            ext
            simpa [h'] 
          simpa using this)

simpa using h.2 (by
          simpa [List.getLast_eq_get] using (by
            simpa [PreStrategy.subtree_incl, hx✝] : (↑((PreStrategy.subtree_incl (restrict hWV hW S).pre ys).val) : List W) ≠ [] ))

simpa using (h.2 (by
          intro hx
          exact (by
            have : (x.val.reverse ≠ []) := by simpa using hx
            simpa using this))

simpa using h.2 (by
          simpa [PreStrategy.subtree_incl, extend_coe] using congrArg ((fun l => l.map (Set.inclusion hWV)) ) (by
            simpa using rfl))
simpa [SetLike.ext'] using (h.2 (by simpa))
simpa using h.2 hx✝

simpa using (h.2 (by
          simpa using (show (xs ++ [A]) ≠ [] from by simp))).2 hx✝
simpa using (h.2 (by simpa))

have hy : (↑ys).map (Set.inclusion hWV) ∈ chainTree V := (PreStrategy.subtree_incl _ ys).prop
        have hy' : (↑ys) ∈ chainTree W := (extend_mem_iff (hWV := hWV) (x := (↑ys))).1 (by simpa using hy)
        have hychain : (↑ys).IsChain (· ≥ ·) := (def_chainTree (V := W) (x := (↑ys))).1 hy'
        exact (List.IsChain.getLast_le (r := (· ≥ ·)) hychain hx✝
exact le_trans (h.2 (by simpa)) (by simpa)
